query:
-- Limpar dados existentes
DELETE FROM safetyLimits;

-- =============================================
-- TENT_A = Manutenção/Clonagem (estufa menor)
-- =============================================

-- MAINTENANCE - Temp: 22-28°C, RH: 50-65%, PPFD: 200-400, pH: 5.8-6.5
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_A', 'MAINTENANCE', 'TEMP', 22.0, 28.0),
('TENT_A', 'MAINTENANCE', 'RH',   50.0, 65.0),
('TENT_A', 'MAINTENANCE', 'PPFD', 200,  400),
('TENT_A', 'MAINTENANCE', 'PH',   5.8,  6.5);

-- CLONING - Temp: 23-26°C, RH: 70-85%, PPFD: 100-200, pH: 5.8-6.2
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_A', 'CLONING', 'TEMP', 23.0, 26.0),
('TENT_A', 'CLONING', 'RH',   70.0, 85.0),
('TENT_A', 'CLONING', 'PPFD', 100,  200),
('TENT_A', 'CLONING', 'PH',   5.8,  6.2);

-- VEGA - Temp: 22-28°C, RH: 50-70%, PPFD: 400-700, pH: 5.8-6.3
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_A', 'VEGA', 'TEMP', 22.0, 28.0),
('TENT_A', 'VEGA', 'RH',   50.0, 70.0),
('TENT_A', 'VEGA', 'PPFD', 400,  700),
('TENT_A', 'VEGA', 'PH',   5.8,  6.3);

-- FLORA - Temp: 20-26°C, RH: 40-55%, PPFD: 600-900, pH: 5.8-6.2
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_A', 'FLORA', 'TEMP', 20.0, 26.0),
('TENT_A', 'FLORA', 'RH',   40.0, 55.0),
('TENT_A', 'FLORA', 'PPFD', 600,  900),
('TENT_A', 'FLORA', 'PH',   5.8,  6.2);

-- DRYING - Temp: 18-22°C, RH: 45-55%, PPFD: 0 (sem luz)
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_A', 'DRYING', 'TEMP', 18.0, 22.0),
('TENT_A', 'DRYING', 'RH',   45.0, 55.0),
('TENT_A', 'DRYING', 'PPFD', 0,    0);

-- =============================================
-- TENT_BC = Vega/Flora (estufas maiores)
-- =============================================

-- MAINTENANCE
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_BC', 'MAINTENANCE', 'TEMP', 22.0, 28.0),
('TENT_BC', 'MAINTENANCE', 'RH',   50.0, 65.0),
('TENT_BC', 'MAINTENANCE', 'PPFD', 200,  400),
('TENT_BC', 'MAINTENANCE', 'PH',   5.8,  6.5);

-- CLONING
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_BC', 'CLONING', 'TEMP', 23.0, 26.0),
('TENT_BC', 'CLONING', 'RH',   70.0, 85.0),
('TENT_BC', 'CLONING', 'PPFD', 100,  200),
('TENT_BC', 'CLONING', 'PH',   5.8,  6.2);

-- VEGA - Estufas maiores podem ter PPFD mais alto
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_BC', 'VEGA', 'TEMP', 22.0, 28.0),
('TENT_BC', 'VEGA', 'RH',   50.0, 70.0),
('TENT_BC', 'VEGA', 'PPFD', 400,  800),
('TENT_BC', 'VEGA', 'PH',   5.8,  6.3);

-- FLORA - Controle rigoroso de RH para evitar botrytis
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_BC', 'FLORA', 'TEMP', 20.0, 26.0),
('TENT_BC', 'FLORA', 'RH',   40.0, 55.0),
('TENT_BC', 'FLORA', 'PPFD', 600,  1000),
('TENT_BC', 'FLORA', 'PH',   5.8,  6.2);

-- DRYING
INSERT INTO safetyLimits (context, phase, metric, minValue, maxValue) VALUES
('TENT_BC', 'DRYING', 'TEMP', 18.0, 22.0),
('TENT_BC', 'DRYING', 'RH',   45.0, 55.0),
('TENT_BC', 'DRYING', 'PPFD', 0,    0);
